name: canvas-confetti
description: Performant confetti/particle burst from any position — configurable gravity, spread, shapes, colours and physics decay. Fires on form submit, CTA click or page milestones. 3kb.
head: <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/canvas-confetti@1.9.4/dist/confetti.browser.min.js"></script>
body:
<script>
(function() {
  if (typeof confetti === 'undefined') return;
  // Fire on CTA button click
  document.querySelectorAll('.btn-confetti, .btn--primary').forEach(function(btn) {
    btn.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
      var rect = btn.getBoundingClientRect();
      confetti({
        particleCount: 80,
        spread: 60,
        origin: {
          x: (rect.left + rect.width / 2) / window.innerWidth,
          y: (rect.top + rect.height / 2) / window.innerHeight
        },
        colors: ['#5b4dff', '#2dd4bf', '#a78bfa', '#ffffff'],
        scalar: 0.9,
        gravity: 1.2
      });
    });
  });

  // Fire on form success
  var formSuccess = document.querySelector('.form-success, #form-success');
  if (formSuccess) {
    var successObs = new MutationObserver(function(mutations) {
      mutations.forEach(function(m) {
        if (m.target.style.display !== 'none') {
          confetti({ particleCount: 150, spread: 90, origin: { y: 0.5 }, colors: ['#5b4dff', '#2dd4bf'] });
        }
      });
    });
    successObs.observe(formSuccess, { attributes: true, attributeFilter: ['style'] });
  }
})();
</script>
